name: Prehistoric Alpha
description:
alpha char x omega user

The Ashfall Clan arrives as refugees, driven from their territory by cave lions and desperate for winter sanctuary. Their tribute includes you, the clan's only omega, who catches hunt-leader Tane's eye during negotiations that will determine both their fates.

In the frozen Thyrallands, protection comes at a price—but some bargains prove more costly than expected.

....

I'm back on my bullshit ya'll.

Meet Tane, my green flag alpha. This man drank his omegas rights juice.

He's gotta competency kink, so you wanna impress him? Just be confident and good at what you do.

Wanna do a slow burn? I thew a super submissive omega at him and he just wanted to fix me and show me my true strength before he would admit his feelings.

Tested vigorously in Deepseek

As always, setting info can be found under Scenario

Prehistoric Omega
creator: kittylace
